mentions.note: HVAC company benefiting from data-center cooling demand; beat Q4 with strong bookings; 12-14% YoY earnings growth guidance for 2026; residential headwind offset by commercial strength.
Rallied 8% on strong Q4 beat and excellent booking numbers; issued bullish 2026 forecast with 12-14% EPS growth; data center strength offsetting residential weakness.

HVAC leader capitalizing on data center cooling buildout with record $10.7B backlog and 24% order growth. EPS growth >20% annually, efficiency innovations unlocking new markets. CEO confirms multi-year demand runway. Cramer: 'What a stock.'

Data center HVAC leader thriving: record $10.7B backlog, Q1 orders +24%, demand pipeline 'most robust ever.' Stock up 23% YTD justified. Services (1/3 of business) provides resilience; US manufacturing footprint 95%; adding 4,000+ jobs. Dave Regnery sees 3–5+ years robust demand; no overbuilding concerns.
